name: Freedom Unlimited

verdict.text: No annual fee with a genuinely flat 1.5% floor: an easy long-term keep

earn_note: The 1.5% flat base (vs. 1% on most no-fee competitors) makes this a strong do-nothing card, and the 3% dining/drugstore categories need no activation or rotation.

redemption_options.method: Statement credit / direct deposit / cash back

points.note: Technically Ultimate Rewards points, not a distinct cash-back currency; on their own they're worth a flat 1¢ each. If this account is paired with a Chase Sapphire or Ink Business card, the combined points inherit that card's full redemption value, including airline/hotel transfers, instead of being capped at 1¢.

transfer_partners.highlight: Not a standalone transfer currency on its own; see the points note above on pairing with a premium Chase card.

credits.name: DoorDash DashPass
credits.subtitle: 6 mo free, then $10/quarter promo
credits.description: 6 months of complimentary DashPass membership ($0 delivery fees on DoorDash/Caviar), which then auto-renews at the regular paid rate unless canceled. Separately, up to $10/quarter in statement credits on non-restaurant (grocery/retail) DoorDash orders through Dec 2027.
tips: Cancel DashPass before the 6-month free trial ends if you don't want to start paying for it; it auto-enrolls at the regular rate.
The $10/quarter non-restaurant credit is the only ongoing recurring value here; the free DashPass trial is one-time.

insurance.detail: +1 year (on warranties ≤3 years, up to 4 years total)

protection_note: Modest but real for a $0 card: trip cancellation and purchase protection exist, but at lower limits than fee-paying travel cards. No trip delay or baggage delay coverage, and rental coverage is secondary only.
rental_note: Secondary coverage only: it pays after your personal auto insurance, covering what's left (deductibles, etc). Use a primary-coverage card, like the Sapphire Preferred, for rentals when possible.

services.name: Foreign transaction fee applies
services.detail: 3% on purchases made outside the US; this card is not built for international use.

services.name: Lyft bonus
services.detail: 2% total cash back on Lyft rides through Sep 30, 2027 (an extra 0.5% on top of the 1.5% base).

additional_cards.title: Additional cards

benefits.text: Earns rewards on their spend (into your account)
Same purchase protection as the primary card

additional_cards.note: No cost to add users: an easy way to consolidate household spend onto the flat 1.5% base.

timeline.text: The Lyft 2% total cash back bonus is scheduled to expire; the DoorDash $10/quarter non-restaurant credit expires Dec 31, 2027.
Added the 3% dining and 3% drugstore categories alongside the Freedom Flex launch, previously the card earned a flat 1.5% on everything.
